findings.hypothesis_text: High cytotoxic T-cell infiltration predicts better overall survival in LUAD
findings.effect: HR 0.58 (95% CI 0.41-0.82), p=0.002, univariate; median OS 62 vs 38 mo
findings.author: Aisha Rahman

findings.hypothesis_text: Cytotoxic signature is a stage-independent prognostic marker in LUAD
findings.effect: HR approximately 0.79, p=0.11 after stage adjustment
findings.reason: Effect collapsed after stage adjustment - signal largely tracked stage. Do not re-run without a multivariate, stage-adjusted design.
findings.author: Aisha Rahman
